title: Crunchy Light Thai Noodles Kanom Jeen
description: A light and crunchy Thai dish featuring white wine and tempering chocolate, egg-free friendly, in the form of kanom jeen noodles. This dish is a unique and delicious twist on traditional Thai cuisine.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the sesame seeds and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the crushed peanuts and cook for 1 minute, until lightly toasted.
Add the white wine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the wine simmer for 2 minutes.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30 second increments, stirring between each interval.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss with the wine and chocolate sauce.
Season with salt and sugar to taste.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional sesame seeds and peanuts if desired.
